label: Codex core targeted merge test (filter + args)
command: set -euo pipefail; export CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH="${CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH:-/tmp/codex-node22/bin/node}"; cargo test -p codex-core --test all "$@"

label: Codex core apply_patch validation
command: set -euo pipefail; export CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH="${CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH:-/tmp/codex-node22/bin/node}"; cargo test -p codex-core tools::runtimes::apply_patch::tests --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all suite::tool_harness::apply_patch_tool_executes_and_emits_patch_events -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all suite::unified_exec::unified_exec_intercepts_apply_patch_exec_command -- --nocapture

label: Codex core merge validation chain
command: set -euo pipefail; export CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH="${CODEX_JS_REPL_NODE_PATH:-/tmp/codex-node22/bin/node}"; cargo test -p codex-core --test all suite::compact::summarize_context_three_requests_and_instructions -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all suite::compact::auto_compact_persists_rollout_entries -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all apply_patch_cli_moves_file_to_new_directory -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all js_repl -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all view_image -- --nocapture; cargo test -p codex-core --test all mcp_call_marks_thread_memory_mode_polluted_when_configured -- --nocapture
